mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_request (from_user_id, to_user_id, status) VALUES (#{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, from_user_id AS fromUserId, to_user_id AS toUserId, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM friend_request WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT fr.id AS requestId, fr.from_user_id AS fromUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(u.display_name), ''), u.username) AS fromDisplayName FROM friend_request fr JOIN app_user u ON u.id = fr.from_user_id WHERE fr.to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND fr.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY fr.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM friend_request WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND status = 'PENDING'

SELECT id, from_user_id AS fromUserId, to_user_id AS toUserId, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM friend_request WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_request SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friend_request WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND ((from_user_id = #{userA} AND to_user_id = #{userB}) OR (from_user_id = #{userB} AND to_user_id = #{userA}))
